Great for gift giving or keep on your counter or at your grill Bullet Point 5: Packed fresh in the USA Product Description: JAMAICAN JERK SPICE RUB

Spiceology Jamaican Jerk spice blend has notes of garlic, chili, onion and hints of cinnamon for an intense jerk flavor. Use Jamaican Jerk Seasoning Blend to season meat, sauces and stews. This grilling blend is versatile in the kitchen for stir-fry, Instant Pot and Slow Cooker recipes.

QUALITY YOU CAN TASTE

Spiceology Jamaican Jerk BBQ Blend is packed fresh offering quality you can taste. All spices, herbs, and blends are Non-Irradiated, no preservatives, all-natural, no MSG, and zero fillers. Spiceology spices come with a "manufactured on" date, so you know with confidence when it was packed.

ABOUT SPICEOLOGY

Spiceology sells over 300 spices, chiles, herbs, salts, and blends. We do not process any forms of gluten, including soy.

NOTE: Packaged in a facility that processes tree nuts, dairy and peanuts.

Low sodium and sugar content, along with all-natural claims, justify a premium price. Packed fresh in the USA adds to perceived quality.

Item Name: Piping Rock Ceylon Cinnamon Powder Organic | 1 lb | Vegetarian Premium Grade | For Coffee, Cooking & Baking | Non-GMO & Gluten Free Bullet Point 1: True Ceylon Cinnamon Bullet Point 2: Organic Certified Bullet Point 3: Add to Foods, Baking, Desserts and More! Bullet Point 4: Non-GMO and Gluten Free Bullet Point 5: Laboratory Tested, using Trusted Ingredients Product Description:

Ceylon Cinnamon powder is considered the “true” cinnamon vs. cassia cinnamon. This spice which is native to Ceylon, or Sri Lanka, has been used for centuries as an addition to foods. The cinnamon that we are familiar with stateside is usually the bark of the cassia tree. The indulgent aroma and bittersweet taste make it a great addition to any dessert recipe or entrée that needs a bit of flavor. From tea to treats, this age old favorite is the perfect cupboard spice to have on hand at all times!

Piping Rock's Promise

Piping Rock proudly offers an ever-growing selection of products designed to help you achieve your unique wellness goals. We verify all products with third-party, FDA-registered agencies ensuring purity, potency, safety, and innovation in everything we do. We’re committed to supporting you in your journey to healthy living, and we thank you for choosing us!

Value: 16.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic spice with USDA certification, positioned as a high-quality Ceylon cinnamon. Packaged in a standard plastic bag but marketed as a trusted, laboratory-tested product. Pricing likely reflects organic certification, premium grade labeling, and non-GMO/gluten-free claims, targeting health-conscious consumers.

Item Name: Frontier Co-op Cut & Sifted Licorice Root 1lb Bullet Point 1: Licorice Root: Wholesale 1lb bag of premium Licorice Root, Kosher certified and non-irradiated. This sweetener, 30-50 times sweeter than sugar, adds familiar flavor to foods and drinks worldwide. Bullet Point 2: The Sweet Root: Our Cut and Sifted Licorice Root sticks offer an aroma reminiscent of sassafras, star anise, and fennel: perfect for enhancing beverages and foods with a balance of sweet and spice. Bullet Point 3: Versatile Uses: Make your own caffeine-free Licorice Root tea, or use as a natural sweetener for herbal teas, cookies, fruit juices and syrups; also commonly used in DIY skincare and cosmetics. Bullet Point 4: Origin/Sourcing: Our Licorice Root is cultivated in Turkey to preserve premium flavor and quality. No artificial additives or chemicals are used, ensuring natural goodness in every package. Bullet Point 5: About Us: Founded in 1976, Frontier Co-op has grown into a leader in natural, organic and fair trade botanicals. We are member-owned, and committed to purity, honesty and quality. Product Description: Frontier Co-op Cut & Sifted Licorice Root sticks are Kosher certified, and non-irradiated. Licorice Root (Glycyrrhiza glabr) is known for its naturally sweet flavoring, wellness benefits and many culinary uses.

Licorice Root, Vegan and All Natural
Dried licorice root can easily become ground licorice root powder for licorice root tea, licorice root capsules and many other uses. You can use the whole pieces as licorice root tea loose leaf, or put into your own empty tea bags for steeping.

Skincare:
Create your own licorice root extract for skin!
DIY aqua licorice root toner, licorice root cream,licorice root serum, lip balm and other natural skin care recipes and products.

Culinary, Restaurant Supplies & Coffee Shop Essentials
Chefs, baristas and business owners alike trust our wholesale licorice root for use as a tea, as a caffeine-free coffee alternative, for various gourmet desserts and more. Our bulk bags are also a great option for those wishing to repackage into your own empty tea bags for personal use or private label resale.

FEATURES
1 pound bulk bag (16 ounces)
Kosher certified, non-irradiated
Hand-selected, high quality
Caffeine-free
Botanical name: Glycyrrhiza glabr
Also known as: Liquorice, and raíz de regaliz Value: 16.0 Unit: Ounce

Item Name: China Rose Radish Sprouting Seeds: 25 Lb - Bulk, Non-GMO Radish Seeds for Micro Greens, Vegetable Garden
Bullet Point 1: Vegetable Garden & Microgreens Sprouting Seeds: Radish - China Rose - 25 Lb
Bullet Point 2: High Germination Rate - Non-GMO - Chemical Free
Bullet Point 3: Perfect for Growing Microgreens & Garden Seeds
Bullet Point 4: Mountain Valley Seed Company Brand
Product Description: Radish Microgreens Seeds. Radish microgreens are substantial and crunchy and taste exactly like radish. Very easy and fast growers. Makes a great addition to any salad, sandwich or garnish. Use sparingly for a radish accent. Notes & Growing Tips: Radish is fast and easy to grow. The microgreen is substantial and very crunchy. Due to its fast growth can be harvested as early as 5 days, assuming you have exposed to light on day 3. These radish microgreens are at their peak of crunchiness at about day 5 or 6. Once they grow larger they get more leafy and lose their crunch. You can flip the lid a day before exposing to light to strengthen the crop. Radish is a green crop with an intense radish flavor great in any microgreen salad or full sized salad. Use instead of sliced radish anywhere you would normally use radish.
Value: 400.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Bulk non-GMO radish seeds for microgreens and gardening, positioned as a high-germination, chemical-free product. Suitable for home gardeners and microgreen enthusiasts, offering value in large quantity. No premium or organic claims, but emphasizes natural and non-GMO attributes for health-conscious consumers.
